text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear someone saying that Nice Nature is by the
riverbank, so I head there to look for her.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Not good enough... I need to be more aware
while I run...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And keep your spirits high, Nature. Don't get all
gloomy. Cheer up!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Come on, remember. Think carefully. How do I
run?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
In the Kyoto Shimbun Hai... I wasn't confident,
but I had to keep going, no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
In the Naruo Kinen, I told myself to keep my mind
clear and look ahead.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And then I made up my mind during the Kokura
Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I just have to be me and keep moving forward,
one step at a time.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Even if I don't know if I'll ever reach my goal...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to face my challenges with everything
I've got.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sure, I'd be lying if I said I'm all confident now...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But there's no way out of this either. That's why I
definitely have to face Teio!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ughhh... You always spoil me with your kindness.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You shouldn't keep doing that or I'll get too
attached. You might end up stuck with me
forever...
choice_data_list: Good work with the solo practice!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Wait, how long have you been there?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ah... actually, don't tell me. I feel like that could
potentially devastate me.
choice_data_list: What was that training you were just doing?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It's more like... I mean it is training, but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I was trying to figure out if I had some type of
edge I could utilize. Anything to get myself closer
to winning.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I figure the key is just before the finish. I really
have to nail the homestretch.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, when you stop and think about it... 3,000
meters is a huge distance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In a 3,000-meter race, unless she judges the
timing of her last spurt well, it'll be difficult for
her to compete even on the final straight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want Nice Nature to run as free as possible so
that her bright smile stays on her face after the
race.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Earth to Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: That's such generic advice...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I unintentionally said what was meant to be
encouragement for myself out loud.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Pfft, haha, hahaha! Come on, Trainer! Your face
tells me everything I need to know.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... But yeah, let's do our best.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: With no way out, I have to keep moving forward.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: By the way, are you free right now?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'll do my best, so... it'd be nice if you could watch
over me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Heh, you're sweet.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: All right, let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I mean, the harder I work, the better the trophies
I get from you, right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hahaha!
